auth.usage_instructions: Use `tiktok auth` to inspect the shared auth/profile surface for this wrapper. The tool does not store TikTok credentials itself; these commands report whether the upstream yt-dlp dependency is available and manage local profiles.

login.help: Configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent.
login.usage_instructions: Use `tiktok auth login` to initialize or refresh the default shared auth/profile record for this wrapper. Key options: --profile/-p, --force/-F, --credential-type/-c.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to save credentials to

logout.usage_instructions: Use `tiktok auth logout` to clear stored auth/profile data for this wrapper. Key options: --profile/-p.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to clear credentials from

profiles.usage_instructions: Use `tiktok auth profiles` to manage shared auth profiles for this wrapper. Consult the leaf commands in this group for the exact action.

create.help: Create a new profile from .env.example template.
create.usage_instructions: Use `tiktok auth profiles create` to create a new shared auth profile from the template. Required argument: NAME.

delete.help: Delete a profile and its data.
delete.usage_instructions: Use `tiktok auth profiles delete` to remove one shared auth profile and its stored data. Required argument: NAME. Key options: --force/-F.

get.help: Get details for a specific profile.
get.usage_instructions: Use `tiktok auth profiles get` when you need to inspect one shared auth profile. Required argument: NAME. Key options: --table/-t.

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to get details for

list.help: List all profiles and show which is the default.
list.usage_instructions: Use `tiktok auth profiles list` to list available shared auth profiles and show which one is default. Key options: --table/-t, --limit/-l, --filter/-f, --properties/-p.

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of profiles to return

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include

remove.help: Delete a profile and its data.

select.help: Activate a profile within its auth type.

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to activate within its auth type

status.help: Check authentication status across profiles. Performs a live round-trip for every configured credential type so the report reflects ground truth — not on-disk belief. Saved credentials whose live verification fails are reported as ``authenticated: false`` with the failure reason in ``api_test``.
status.usage_instructions: Use `tiktok auth status` to run live readiness checks for the upstream yt-dlp dependency across profiles. Key options: --profile/-p, --table/-t.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to check (defaults to all profiles)

test.help: Test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles.
test.usage_instructions: Use `tiktok auth test` to verify the upstream yt-dlp dependency is installed and callable across profiles. Key options: --table/-t, --verbose/-v, --profile/-p.

transcripts.usage_instructions: Use `tiktok transcripts` for TikTok transcript download operations. Consult the leaf commands in this group for the exact action.

download.help: Download transcripts for one or more TikTok videos.
download.usage_instructions: Use `tiktok transcripts download` to fetch one or more TikTok transcripts through yt-dlp. Required argument: URLS. Key options: --output-dir/-o, --format/-f, --lang/-l, --manual-sub, --table/-t.

usage_instructions: Use `tiktok` when you need to download TikTok video transcripts or inspect the wrapper's shared auth/profile surface. Use `tiktok transcripts download` for transcript work and `tiktok auth ...` to verify upstream yt-dlp readiness or inspect profiles.
